creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Announce: http://mail.xfce.org/pipermail/xfce/2012-March/030067.html

Speed dial page works well again (with previous version 0.4.1, and 0.4.3, it was broken). Users with webkit-gtk2 >= 1.6.1 don't need any more of patch file, patch-Source_WebKit_gtk_webkit_webkitwebview.cpp (it was corrected since Midori 0.4.3).

Note: This package was tested with webkit-gtk2-1.6.3.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
